title: Rabbid Totem
description: Changes the totem of undying texture to a rabbid with a custom sound
body:
Changes the totem of undying texture to a rabbid with a custom sound when you pop.

![rabbid totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a5c82f6f8339c0aa63c8c91555f9eb925eb5cac.png)


Frequently Asked Questions:
- Are we ALL using this? Yes.
- Will this make me good at Minecraft? Yes.
- bwa bwa
